subcodes.first_line: O Jamshid! The Cup of Jamshid is more renowned throughout the world than the radiant sun, yet all are in thrall to the illusions of that cup [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جمشید جام جم در جهان مشهورتر از مهر تابانست ولی کل تابع اوهام ان جام ساغر
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @spiritual transformation
